check_constraints.check_clause: ([scope_type]='GLOBAL' AND [scope_id] IS NULL OR [scope_type]='REGION' AND [scope_id] IS NOT NULL OR [scope_type]='AREA' AND [scope_id] IS NOT NULL OR [scope_type]='PROJECT' AND [scope_id] IS NOT NULL)
(NOT ([status]='COMPLETED' OR [status]='ACTIVE' OR [status]='APPROVED') OR [equipment_id] IS NOT NULL)
